Trend Scout Daily Briefing — 2026-04-24

Scouted at 09:00 UTC | Sources: trendshift.io, trustmrr.com

Trendshift — Top Trending GitHub Projects

2 build-your-own-x 492.8k Education Master programming by recreating tech from scratch
3 coding-study-plan 341.7k Education Complete CS study plan to become a software engineer
4 DESIGN.md files 62.9k AI/Design Brand design system files for coding agents to generate matching UI
5 AI Agents Lessons 58.6k AI/Education 12 lessons to get started building AI agents

9 production-eng-skills 20.8k AI/Dev Tools Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents
10 agent-skills-collection 18.3k AI/Dev Tools 1000+ agent skills for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, etc.

20 desktop-skill-manager 338 AI/Dev Tools Desktop app to manage AI agent skills across 20+ platforms

Trendshift Patterns

  • Claude Code ecosystem dominance — 8 of 20 projects directly serve Claude Code / AI coding agents
  • Agent skills as the new "plugins" — Skills frameworks, collections, and managers are exploding
  • Design-meets-AI — DESIGN.md and Huashu point to AI agents generating production UI
  • Transparency/leaks as content — Leaked system prompts at 22.5k stars shows demand for AI system transparency

TrustMRR Notables Beyond Top 20

  • Ryze AI (#24): $65,233 MRR, 177% growth — AI agents managing Google & Meta ads (fastest grower)
  • Besbet (#33): $54,287 MRR, 50% growth — high growth, unknown details
  • Stealth social tool (#34): $51,536 MRR, 49% growth — social network distribution tool
  • BackPedal (#29): $56,521 MRR, 42% growth — GPS bike tracking & recovery
  • Indexsy (#46): $39,556 MRR, 139% growth — digital asset building & scaling
  • ChatDash (#40): $47,369 MRR, 24% growth — white-label AI assistant dashboard for agencies

Cross-Reference: Trendshift × TrustMRR

Overlap Projects (Trending + Making Money)

No direct project overlap between the two lists today. Trendshift is dominated by open-source developer/AI tools, while TrustMRR skews toward bootstrapped SaaS in health, marketing, and creator economy.

This gap itself is the insight: open-source hype and bootstrapped revenue live in different worlds.

Adjacent Overlaps (Thematic)

Theme Trendshift Side TrustMRR Side Insight
AI Video Generation AI Short Video Engine (6.3k ⭐) Vid.AI ($95k MRR), Speel ($65k MRR) Open-source tools trending while commercial versions already printing money
AI for SEO/Marketing SeoBOT ($73k MRR), Cometly ($216k MRR), AEO Engine ($55k MRR) Agent skills for marketing (23.8k ⭐) AI marketing skills are hot open-source AND monetizing as SaaS
Code Education build-your-own-x (492.8k ⭐), study plan (341.7k ⭐) Codédex ($84k MRR) Massive free demand exists; Codédex proves Gen Z will pay
LLM Observability Langfuse (25.8k ⭐, YC W23) — Open-source leader but no bootstrapped competitor in top 50 MRR
AI Agent Infrastructure headless-browser-ai, code-search-mcp DM Champ ($187k MRR, AI sales agent) Infrastructure trending; vertical AI agents already monetizing

Top 5 "Wow + Money" — Thematic Winners

  1. AI Video Generation — Trending open-source engines + Vid.AI at $95k MRR + Speel at $65k MRR. The gap between free tools and paid is narrow; monetization is in polish & distribution.
  2. AI Agent Skills Ecosystem — 3 trending repos (skills collection 18.3k, production skills 20.8k, skills framework 1.4k) + DM Champ at $187k MRR selling AI sales agents. Skills are the new API.
  3. AI-Powered Marketing — Cometly ($216k), SeoBOT ($73k), Prosp ($128k), Postiz ($97k) all monetizing while agent marketing skills trend on GitHub.
  4. Developer Education — build-your-own-x (492.8k ⭐) + study plan (341.7k ⭐) + Codédex ($84k MRR). Education is evergreen and monetizable.
  5. Claude Code Ecosystem — 8 trending repos serve Claude Code. No direct MRR winner yet, but the platform effect is massive. First mover to monetize Claude Code skill marketplaces wins.

Top 5 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About

  1. Kibu — $234k MRR, zero hype. Niche EHR for I/DD providers across 48 states. Regulatory moat + underserved market.
  2. 1Capture — $216k MRR, 2% growth. Trial-to-paid conversion without code changes. Boring but extremely valuable.
  3. TrimRx — $332k MRR, 11% growth. GLP-1 telehealth is booming quietly. Weight loss + AI = sticky subscription.
  4. Dealsourcr — $148k MRR, 19% growth. Property deal sourcing. Unsexy real estate tech with solid growth.
  5. ChatDash — $47k MRR, 24% growth. White-label AI dashboards for agencies. Picks and shovels for the AI agency gold rush.

Top 5 Trending with No Monetization (Opportunities)

  1. CLAUDE.md (81.1k ⭐) — Config files for Claude Code behavior. Zero monetization. Opportunity: Premium curated CLAUDE.md templates for enterprises.
  2. Leaked System Prompts (22.5k ⭐) — Transparency project, no revenue. Opportunity: Paid newsletter/alerts for prompt changes; red-teaming service.
  3. RAG-Anything (18.1k ⭐) — Open-source RAG framework. Opportunity: Hosted RAG-as-a-service; enterprise support.
  4. Code Search MCP (8.3k ⭐) — Codebase context for AI agents. Opportunity: Cloud-hosted version for non-technical teams.
  5. ML-Intern (1.5k ⭐) — Open-source ML engineer. Opportunity: Managed ML pipeline service; "ML-as-a-intern" SaaS.

Key Patterns

  1. Claude Code is the new platform. 8/20 trending repos serve it directly. The ecosystem is forming faster than VS Code extensions did in 2016.
  2. Health tech is quietly printing money. TrimRx ($332k), Kibu ($234k), Hormone Clinic ($150k) — 3 of top 12 are health. No health projects trending on GitHub.
  3. The AI agent skills gold rush is real. Skills collections, frameworks, managers, and marketplaces are exploding. The infrastructure is being built NOW.
  4. Bootstrapped SaaS > VC-backed hype. TrustMRR shows hundreds of solo/small-team SaaS doing $50k-$200k MRR. No VC needed. The trendshift list has zero overlap with TrustMRR — hype and revenue are decoupled.
  5. GLP-1 economy is a startup category. TrimRx at $332k MRR is just the tip. Weight loss telehealth is a goldmine.

Money vs Hype Gap

  • Hyped but not monetizing: Claude Code ecosystem tools, agent skills frameworks, leaked prompts. Massive engagement, zero direct revenue. These are picks-and-shovels for someone else's gold rush.
  • Monetizing but not hyped: Kibu ($234k), 1Capture ($216k), TrimRx ($332k), Dealsourcr ($148k). Boring niches with real customers paying real money. No Twitter threads needed.

Quick Takes

  • Build for Claude Code now. The ecosystem is at VS Code extension circa 2017. First movers in skill marketplaces, premium templates, and enterprise tooling will capture massive value.
  • Health + AI is the stealth goldmine. Three health startups in TrustMRR top 12. Zero health projects on Trendshift. The gap between what developers find exciting and what actually makes money has never been wider.
  • Ryze AI's 177% growth at $65k MRR is the signal. AI managing ad spend is the next "AI writing assistant" — everyone needs it, early players win. Watch this space.

Report generated by Trend Analyst | 2026-04-24 | Data: trendshift.io + trustmrr.com
